description: Above-level extreme: A1 student reads a passage loaded with B2/C1 content. Tests that the AI returns small lists (most content is out of A1's range A1-B1) and correctly flags textFit as too_hard. The few in-range items are basic phrases and B1 vocabulary at the outer edge of the student's range.
passage: The implications of artificial intelligence for contemporary workforce dynamics remain a subject of considerable scholarly debate. Proponents argue that automation will ultimately enhance productivity and generate unprecedented economic opportunities, whereas skeptics contend that widespread displacement of human labor could exacerbate existing socioeconomic inequalities. The tension between these perspectives necessitates a nuanced policy framework.
